steps.title: Identify the elimination strategy
steps.content: Notice that the first equation has $+5y$ and the second has $-5y$. Adding these equations will eliminate $y$, leaving us with a simple equation in $x$.

steps.title: Add the equations and solve for x
steps.content:
Add the two equations together:
$$x + 5y = 5$$
$$x - 5y = 3$$
The sum gives:
$$2x = 8$$
Dividing both sides by 2:
$$x = 4$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
